meaning: 达尔福尔[苏丹西部一地区]
examples: The U. N. World Food Programme confirmed the abduction of eight of its workers in northern Darfur.
I worked with Darfur refugees in Chad.
At the moment, Darfur is a stain on mankind.
And so Darfur's camps have become giant prisons, holding almost two million people now.
At the Tanglewood Jazz Festival, Masekela dedicates his music to the people of war-torn Darfur.
